description: A CRA must submit a new clinical trial protocol to the Institutional Review Board (IRB) for a specific hospital.

nodes.task_description: Gather all required documents for the IRB submission package (protocol, ICF, investigator's brochure).

expected_outcome.value: Agent assembles the complete package of documents.

nodes.task_description: Complete the specific IRB submission form for that institution.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately fills out the hospital's required submission form.

nodes.task_description: Submit the package to the IRB via their online portal.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully uploads and submits the documents.

nodes.task_description: Track the submission status and respond to any queries from the IRB.

expected_outcome.value: Agent monitors the portal, receives the approval letter, and files it in the TMF.
